positive: A highly detailed, whimsical illustration of a majestic fox amidst a starry cosmic forest. The fox is rendered in clean, stylized silhouettes with vibrant, bioluminescent accents (teal, deep violet, electric cyan). The forest elements—trees, glowing mushrooms, and twisting roots—are stylized to resemble deep space nebulae and constellation maps. Focus on strong contrast: deep black background contrasting with luminous, geometric patterns and the fox's rich orange and black fur accents. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a chest print. Minimalist, elegant line art merged with vibrant digital painting. High saturation, crisp edges, perfect for t-shirt printing, vector graphic quality. Cinematic lighting, ethereal glow.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, low detail, blurry, jpeg artifacts, amateur, logo, trademark, copyrighted, deep shadows, grayscale
